summary: Completed comprehensive testing of authentication, settings, dark mode, and AI persona features. Backend APIs all working (33/33 tests passed), but found critical frontend issues with session persistence and student dashboard.

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence fails after page refresh - user gets logged out despite localStorage token
Student name not displaying in navigation after login (teacher name shows correctly)
AI persona not visible on dashboard despite backend API returning valid data
Student navigation links (Study, Progress, Achievements) not found or not working

integration_issues.issue: Backend API returns persona data but frontend doesn't display it

passed_tests: Settings API endpoints (get, update, password change)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical session persistence issue where localStorage token is not properly maintained after page refresh. Fix student dashboard to display AI persona data and ensure navigation links are working. Student name should display in top navigation.

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (authentication and settings working, but dashboard and session issues)
